creator: p2nd8vp02@sneakemail.com
text:
mbone/udpcast isn't being maintained by a specific person, but the port is just over 3 years old, and the original site doesn't offer that version anymore.  Would it be possible to get it updated?  Newest is 20070622.

Script errors because it couldn't download from udpcast.linux.lu, and I guess FreeBSD's own FTP server was shut down.  The install threw an error and that's when I realized it's seriously out of date!

Thank you all.

How-To-Repeat: Try to build mbone/udpcast, and note that it tries to install 20040531 version.
